channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [Transformer] sglang
item.description:
📉 Rank: #9 → #10 (↓1)
SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
Language: Python
Category: Transformer Stars: 24,928 | Forks: 4,960

item.title: [Transformer] vit-pytorch
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #9 in Transformer
Implementation of Vision Transformer, a simple way to achieve SOTA in vision classification with only a single transformer encoder, in Pytorch
Language: Python
Category: Transformer Stars: 24,977 | Forks: 3,479

item.title: [MoE] Bangumi
item.description:
📉 Rank: #6 → #7 (↓1)
:electron: An unofficial https://bgm.tv ui first app client for Android and iOS, built with React Native. 一个无广告、以爱好为驱动、不以盈利为目的、专门做 ACG 的类似豆瓣的追番记录，bgm.tv 第三方客户端。为移动端重新设计，内置大量加强的网页端难以实现的功能，且提供了相当的自定义选项。 目前已适配 iOS / Android。
Language: TypeScript
Category: MoE Stars: 5,319 | Forks: 157

item.title: [MoE] MoeKoeMusic
item.description:
📈 Rank: #7 → #6 (↑1)
一款开源简洁高颜值的酷狗第三方客户端 An open-source, concise, and aesthetically pleasing third-party client for KuGou that supports Windows / macOS / Linux / Web :electron:
Language: Vue
Category: MoE Stars: 5,320 | Forks: 352

item.title: [LLM] llama.cpp
item.description:
📉 Rank: #8 → #9 (↓1)
LLM inference in C/C++
Language: C++
Category: LLM Stars: 99,129 | Forks: 15,740

item.title: [LLM] everything-claude-code

item.title: [AI] openclaw
